'''tagoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osbornite|osbornite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osbornite|osbornite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tagoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægeyeth|tægeyeth]] || [[word:tægeyej|tægeyej]] || [[word:tægeyesh|tægeyesh]] || [[word:tægeye|tægeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagogoyoth|tagogoyoth]] || [[word:tagogoyoj|tagogoyoj]] || [[word:tagogoyosh|tagogoyosh]] || [[word:tagogoyo|tagogoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagoyoth|tagoyoth]] || [[word:tagoyoj|tagoyoj]] || [[word:tagoyosh|tagoyosh]] || [[word:tagoyo|tagoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagofyoth|tagofyoth]] || [[word:tagofyoj|tagofyoj]] || [[word:tagofyosh|tagofyosh]] || [[word:tagofyof|tagofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagoyotho|tagoyotho]] || [[word:tagoyojo|tagoyojo]] || [[word:tagoyosho|tagoyosho]] || [[word:tagoyoko|tagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagoyoth|tagoyoth]] || [[word:tagoyoj|tagoyoj]] || [[word:tagoyosh|tagoyosh]] || [[word:tagoyo|tagoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagoyothol|tagoyothol]] || [[word:tagoyojol|tagoyojol]] || [[word:tagoyoshol|tagoyoshol]] || [[word:tagoyokol|tagoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagoyothotho|tagoyothotho]] || [[word:tagoyojojo|tagoyojojo]] || [[word:tagoyoshosho|tagoyoshosho]] || [[word:tagoyoko|tagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagoyothon|tagoyothon]] || [[word:tagoyojon|tagoyojon]] || [[word:tagoyoshon|tagoyoshon]] || [[word:tagoyokon|tagoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagoyothoro|tagoyothoro]] || [[word:tagoyojoro|tagoyojoro]] || [[word:tagoyoshoro|tagoyoshoro]] || [[word:tagoyokoro|tagoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
